GITHUB ACTIONS WORKFLOWS — ImóvelPost
======================================

This folder contains two automated workflows that run on GitHub Actions
whenever code is pushed to the main branch.


1. ci.yml — Continuous Integration (typecheck)
-----------------------------------------------
Triggered on: every push to main, and on pull requests to main.

What it does:
  - Installs Node.js 24 and pnpm
  - Installs all workspace dependencies
  - Runs `pnpm run typecheck` across all packages (libs + artifacts)

Purpose:
  Catches TypeScript errors early, before they reach the server or users.
  Runs on every change so broken code is caught immediately.

Required secrets: none.


2. deploy.yml — Deploy Frontend to GitHub Pages
------------------------------------------------
Triggered on: every push to main, and manually via the GitHub Actions UI.

What it does:
  - Installs dependencies and builds the shared TypeScript libraries
  - Builds the React frontend (artifacts/imovelpost) as a static site
  - Deploys the built files to GitHub Pages

Purpose:
  Hosts the frontend (UI only) as a static site on GitHub Pages.
  The frontend still needs a running API server to work — set the
  VITE_API_BASE_URL secret in your repository settings to point at
  your deployed backend (e.g. https://your-server.com/api).

Required GitHub repository settings:
  - Settings > Pages > Source: set to "GitHub Actions"

Required secrets (Settings > Secrets and variables > Actions):
  - VITE_API_BASE_URL: the full base URL of your API server, e.g.
    https://your-api-server.com/api
    Leave empty if running locally — the app will fall back to /api.


NOTES
-----
- The API server (artifacts/api-server) is NOT deployed here.
  It must be run separately on your own server or Replit.
  See SETUP.md at the project root for local setup instructions.

- Both workflows require the `workflow` scope on any GitHub Personal
  Access Token used to push to this repository.
